title: Inflated Network Multipartite Nonlocality

priority.reason: 暂不整合 — 贡献度或兼容性不足

dimension_details.computability: 低可演算性：需大幅抽象，可能丢失物理保真度
dimension_details.parameterizability: 参数数量4，演化空间理想
dimension_details.competitive_asymmetry: 低竞争不对称性：策略空间趋近于零和博弈

dimension_details.anti_gravity_potential: 低反引力潜力：与时空曲率无直接关联
dimension_details.empirical_anchoring: 弱经验锚定：纯理论推测或跨领域迁移

suggested_fitness_function: f(n_parties, copy_count, noise_tolerance, threshold_sensitivity) → composite_fitness / energy_cost
